text: Hello. Hi, good morning. This is Rachel. So, I'm calling because they're pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Mississippi State Relief Program. So, have you been notified about these benefits yet? I know about that, but I'm not qualified for them. That's what I've got for you. Thank you.
